votes.rationale: WS-D spec deliverable complete: bootstrap-manifest.schema.yaml committed with 12 Wave 0 artifacts classified (3 generated, 6 copied, 2 stubbed, 1 manual-only). bootstrap-generator.spec.md defines the full behavioral contract: input validation, synthesis rules, hard prohibitions, idempotency, and dry-run.

All four classification categories enforced with explicit rules. Manual-only boundary on proposal.md is hard. CLAUDE.md correctly reclassified as stubbed (not manual-only). Hard prohibitions are specific and implementable.
Spec is clear enough to implement from without ambiguity. OffBook.ai secondary repo emission rule (emit_nothing) is correctly scoped. Prohibitions prevent governance artifact pollution.
